questions.question: How many papers in the corpus benchmark on COCO?
questions.system_answer: 37 papers in the corpus benchmark on COCO.

questions.question: Which paper is the most cited within this corpus?
questions.system_answer: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale has the highest number of citations from other papers in this corpus, with 83 in-corpus citations.

questions.question: What architecture does ViT use?
questions.system_answer: ViT uses a pure Transformer encoder architecture: it splits an image into fixed-size patches, linearly embeds the patches, adds positional embeddings and a learnable [class] token, and then feeds the sequence into a standard Transformer encoder for classification. The evidence also notes a hybrid variant that uses CNN feature maps as input, but the core ViT is transformer-only.
